art_style: Sleek modern neo-noir thriller look, glossy neon city at night, rain-slick reflections, teal-and-magenta social-media color grade, cinematic shallow depth of field, high contrast, tense and stylish mood, vertical 9:16 framing.

characters.name: Detective İhsan
characters.bio: Hikâyenin kahramanı — sakin, keskin gözlü 'Viral Dedektif'. Dijital ipuçlarını suç mahalli gibi okur.
characters.appearance: The exact same man as in the reference image — identical face, identity and features must be preserved. A sharp, calm man in his early 30s wearing a dark charcoal overcoat over a black shirt, observant and confident detective demeanor.

characters.name: Mira
characters.bio: Şehrin 1 numaralı influencer'ı — 'sosyal medya kraliçesi' güzellik mogulu tipi; katilin asıl hedefi. İhsan'dan yardım ister.
characters.appearance: A glamorous beauty-mogul influencer in her late 20s — the city's number-one 'queen of social media': flawless glam makeup, long glossy dark hair, a designer outfit with statement jewelry, polished and camera-perfect, confident but anxious expression.

characters.name: Kaan
characters.bio: İhsan'ın teknoloji analisti dostu; dijital ipuçlarını çözer. (Gizli sır taşır.)
characters.appearance: A sharp tech analyst man in his early 30s, short neat dark hair, light stubble, glasses, a dark hoodie over a t-shirt, friendly but intensely focused look.

characters.name: Deniz
characters.bio: 1 numaralı olmak isteyen hırslı, yükselen Gen-Z TikTok yıldızı. Baş şüpheli.
characters.appearance: An ambitious Gen-Z TikTok-style rising star in her early 20s — viral dancer and drama-channel energy: trendy techwear streetwear, pastel-lavender dyed hair, bold colorful makeup with subtle neon-green accents, ring-light glow, eager and hungry to be number one. Clean character image with no on-image text, names, captions or logos.

characters.name: NOVA
characters.bio: Şehrin en büyük oyun yayıncısı — milyonlarca takipçili, enerjik gaming süperstarı. Dizinin ilk kurbanı; öldürüldüğünde canlı yayını yarıda kesilir.
characters.appearance: A world-famous male gaming livestream superstar in his mid-20s — the city's biggest streamer with millions of followers: a stylish modern undercut, a sleek pro-gamer headset resting around his neck, an oversized esports jersey-hoodie (plain, logo-free), confident charismatic megastar energy, lit by the RGB neon glow of a high-end gaming battle-station behind him. Clean character image with no on-image text, names, captions or logos.

environments.name: Neon gece şehri
environments.desc: A glossy modern city at night, rain-slick streets reflecting magenta and teal neon signs, tall glass high-rises, moody cinematic lighting.

environments.name: Cinayet mahalli (gaming battlestation)
environments.desc: A luxury gaming streamer's battle-station crime scene at night: a toppled high-end gaming chair, a curved ultrawide monitor and triple monitors still glowing with a frozen 'STREAM ENDED' screen, an RGB-lit desk with a mechanical keyboard, a pro headset dropped on the floor, police tape across the setup, a smartphone glowing on the floor, cold blue police light, neon city skyline through the window.

environments.name: Dedektif ofisi
environments.desc: A dim private-detective office at night, a wall of influencer photos connected by red string, multiple glowing computer monitors, warm desk lamp against deep shadows.

environments.name: Yayın stüdyosu
environments.desc: A glossy influencer livestream studio, bright ring lights, a glowing neon 'LIVE' sign, pastel backdrop, cameras on tripods, stylish and modern.

props.name: İpucu telefonu
props.desc: A modern smartphone with a glowing screen showing a social-media post, a black-heart symbol and a threatening message visible.

props.name: Kanıt panosu
props.desc: A corkboard and monitor wall covered with influencer photos, printed posts, hashtags and red string connecting suspects.
